impact: smoke test no longer exercises main()/StdioServerTransport bootstrap path; CLI wiring regressions would not be caught
resolution: test/smoke.test.ts now spawns the built `dist/cli.js` with `--mcp` over a real child process, completes the MCP initialize handshake + notifications/initialized, and verifies tools/list returns all three T-022 tools. Skipped when dist/cli.js is missing (pre-build). The test catches CLI wiring regressions end-to-end — shebang, --mcp flag parse, StdioServerTransport.connect, and listTools response shape must all work together for it to pass.
title: [test coverage] smoke test no longer exercises main()/StdioServerTransport bootstrap path; CLI w
